Class FishingSkill

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill.AbstractSkill
net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.skill.FishingSkill
All Implemented Interfaces:
Skill, Watchable, org.bukkit.event.Listener
public final class FishingSkill extends AbstractSkill
The Fishing skill contributed to Sylphian-Skills by Sylphian-Fishing.

Acts as the event coordinator: routes Bukkit events to the appropriate ability logic and manages shared per-player state. Abilities are constructed with injected dependencies in registerListeners(Plugin, SkillsAPI) and added in unlock-level order so the framework surfaces them correctly.

Active ability selection and activation (sneak + right-click) is handled generically by ActiveAbilityCoordinator in Sylphian-Skills. This class only implements activationMaterial() and canInteract(Player, UUID) to participate in that framework.

All state maps are accessed on the main thread only.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<org.bukkit.Material>
    activationMaterial()
    The item a player must hold for the ActiveAbilityCoordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures.
    boolean
    canInteract(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
    Suppresses ability activation while the hook is in the water so the player can reel in normally with a right-click.
    void
    onFish(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerFishEvent event)
    Routes fishing state changes to the appropriate handler.
    void
    onQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)
    Clears all per-player state on disconnect.
    void
    onTeleport(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerTeleportEvent event)
    Resets Steady Current momentum on a world change or a distant teleport (more than 10 blocks), since the player has left their fishing spot.
    void
    registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin owningPlugin, SkillsAPI api)
    Constructs abilities with their injected dependencies, registers them in unlock-level order, reads the initial config snapshot, and registers this skill as a Bukkit listener via the parent.
    void
    reload()
    Swaps the config snapshot on a Fishing plugin reload.

  • Constructor Details

    • FishingSkill

      public FishingSkill(SylphianFishing plugin)
      Parameters:
      plugin - the owning Fishing plugin instance

  • Method Details

    • registerListeners

      public void registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin owningPlugin, SkillsAPI api)
      Constructs abilities with their injected dependencies, registers them in unlock-level order, reads the initial config snapshot, and registers this skill as a Bukkit listener via the parent.
      Specified by:
      registerListeners in interface Skill
      Overrides:
      registerListeners in class AbstractSkill
      Parameters:
      owningPlugin - the plugin that owns this skill's listeners
      api - the skills API for XP, cooldowns, and buff tracking

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Swaps the config snapshot on a Fishing plugin reload.

    • activationMaterial

      public Optional<org.bukkit.Material> activationMaterial()
      The item a player must hold for the ActiveAbilityCoordinator to intercept sneak-right-click gestures.
      Returns:
      the trigger material, or empty if not applicable

    • canInteract

      public boolean canInteract(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid)
      Suppresses ability activation while the hook is in the water so the player can reel in normally with a right-click.
      Parameters:
      player - the interacting player
      uuid - the player's UUID
      Returns:
      true if activation should proceed

    • onFish

      public void onFish(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerFishEvent event)
      Routes fishing state changes to the appropriate handler. Runs at HIGHEST so passive timer reductions are applied after BiteTimerService (NORMAL) has already set the hook's wait times.

    • onQuit

      public void onQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)
      Clears all per-player state on disconnect.

    • onTeleport

      public void onTeleport(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerTeleportEvent event)
      Resets Steady Current momentum on a world change or a distant teleport (more than 10 blocks), since the player has left their fishing spot.
